name: AfdxGetSignalOpaque
title: AfdxGetSignalOpaque
syntax: long AfdxGetSignalOpaque( long packet, char signalName[], long bufSize, byte buffer[] ); // form 1
long AfdxGetSignalOpaque( long packet, long offset, long bufSize, byte buffer[] ); // form 2
long AfdxGetSignalOpaque( long packet, long offset, long length, long bufSize, byte buffer[] ); // form 3
description: This function copies the content of an opaque data to the specified buffer. There are two different opaque data types available in AFDX:
Since the opaque type is not detectable from the payload stream it must be described explicitly by the network designer.

parameters.name: signalName
parameters.description: Name of the signal. Note: The signal, the signal’s data type and the message need to be defined in the assigned DBC file.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset value points to the starting byte of the opaque signal in the AFDX payload area.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: This is the number of bytes to be copied from the fixed size opaque signal to the specified buffer.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer containing the read data. Make sure that the size of the buffer is at least length bytes.

return:
Number of copied data bytes.
If this value is > bufSize an error occurred.

description: Analyze signals from an incoming AFDX packet using DBC information

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
